prevalence.trend: stable; increasing detection with routine calcium testing

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; morbidity from stones and bone loss

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Elevated calcium with inappropriately high PTH; assess vitamin D, renal function, bone density

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with surgical cure when indicated

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Lab testing and parathyroid imaging widely available
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Parathyroidectomy for symptomatic or meeting criteria; monitoring for mild cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Variation in surgical access across countries
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Clear diagnostic criteria and effective surgical treatment
